summary.zh-CN: 变更说明: 新增品牌自定义能力，支持上传与管理品牌 Logo，并在设置中扩展相关定制入口，便于为不同部署环境统一界面标识。
summary.en: Change Summary: Added brand customization support with logo upload and management, plus expanded settings entry points for deployment-specific branding.

bodyHtml.zh-CN:
产品改进

品牌自定义能力

  • 变更说明: 新增品牌自定义能力，支持上传与管理品牌 Logo，并在设置中扩展相关定制入口，便于为不同部署环境统一界面标识。
  • 影响范围: 影响 frontend 相关功能、settings 相关功能、看板与项目视图。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

Git 管理体验增强

  • 变更说明: Git 管理体验增强，新增仓库搜索与筛选能力，并在看板下拉菜单中加入 Git Management 快捷入口，减少仓库切换与定位成本。
  • 影响范围: 影响 看板与项目视图、Git 与仓库工具、frontend 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过现有的 Git 或仓库相关面板使用该能力，新增行为会直接出现在原有操作入口中。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

调试与会话界面继续完善

  • 变更说明: 调试与会话界面继续完善，新增 DLC 禁用开关、状态栏引导提示、Hero 模型标签显示，以及并发和聊天相关本地化文案更新。
  • 影响范围: 影响 debug 相关功能、statusbar 相关功能、角色与职业元数据。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

问题修复

Hermes 对嵌套失败载荷的错误信息提取

  • 变更说明: 改进 Hermes 对嵌套失败载荷的错误信息提取，出现异常时能提供更直接的诊断信息。
  • 影响范围: 影响 hermes 相关功能、health 相关功能、分布式会话运行时。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该条目还包含配套的稳定性或清理工作，用来保证可见行为在新流程下保持可靠。

会话快照合并、侧边抽屉与提案面板处理

  • 变更说明: 优化会话快照合并、侧边抽屉与提案面板处理，以及通用和调试设置组件结构，减少界面状态不一致问题。
  • 影响范围: 影响 panels 相关功能、settings 相关功能、会话流程。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

Orleans 动态端口探测、健康检查与持久化冲突决策相关逻辑

  • 变更说明: 改进 Orleans 动态端口探测、健康检查与持久化冲突决策相关逻辑，提升服务启动与运行稳定性。
  • 影响范围: 影响 分布式会话运行时、health 相关功能、panels 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。
bodyHtml.en:
Product Improvements

Brand customization support

  • Change Summary: Added brand customization support with logo upload and management, plus expanded settings entry points for deployment-specific branding.
  • Impact: Affects Frontend, Settings, kanban and project views.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing brand customization support entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Git management

  • Change Summary: Improved Git management with repository search and filtering, and added a Git Management quick action in the kanban dropdown to reduce navigation overhead.
  • Impact: Affects kanban and project views, Git and repository tools, Frontend.
  • How to Use: Open the Git or repository-related panels you already use; the new capability is surfaced inside those existing actions.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Continued refining debug

  • Change Summary: Continued refining debug and session surfaces with a DLC disable switch, status-bar guidance, hero model labels in conversations, and updated localization for concurrency and chat flows.
  • Impact: Affects Debug, Statusbar, hero and role metadata.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Fixes

Hermes error extraction for nested failure payloads so failures surface more direct diagnostic detail.

  • Change Summary: Improved Hermes error extraction for nested failure payloads so failures surface more direct diagnostic detail.
  • Impact: Affects Hermes.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: No additional migration step is expected; this version mainly improves the reliability of the existing flow.

Session snapshot merging

  • Change Summary: Refined session snapshot merging, drawer and proposal panel handling, and the general/debug settings components to reduce inconsistent UI state.
  • Impact: Affects Panels, Settings, session workflows.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing session snapshot merging entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Orleans dynamic port probing

  • Change Summary: Improved Orleans dynamic port probing, health-check wiring, and persistence-conflict decision handling for more reliable service startup and runtime behavior.
  • Impact: Affects distributed session runtime, Health, Panels.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.
